description: Quality level definitions for puzzle data completeness rating. Scale: 1=worst, 5=best (matches source-quality.json).

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Added display configuration with star/level colors.

1.name: unverified
1.description: Problem setup only - solution not yet verified in our system

2.name: basic
2.description: Solution tree present but no refutation branches

3.name: standard
3.description: Valid solution with at least one refutation branch

4.name: high
4.description: Complete solution with good refutation coverage and comments

5.name: premium
5.description: Full solution tree with multiple lines, rich refutations, and explanatory comments
